meaning: n.拉地诺语(一种西班牙犹太人说的方言)
examples: They lived in Skopje, Stip and especially Bitola, which used to be known as Monastir, and spoke Ladino, or Judaeo-Spanish.
Rodrigue's parents spoke Ladino to each other but it has not been passed on to his children, or to most of the new generation of Sephardic Jews around the world.
He's a speaker of a dying language, Ladino.
